PUPPET_FILE
  Puppet: CLASS_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(CLASS)('class')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      Puppet: NAMESPACE_DEFINITION
        PsiElement(NAME)('class_name')
      PsiElement(::)('::')
      Puppet: NAMESPACE_DEFINITION
        PsiElement(NAME)('role')
      PsiElement(::)('::')
      PsiElement(NAME)('role_name')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(INHERITS)('inherits')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('::role::java')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      Puppet: INCLUDE_CLASS_STATEMENT
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('include')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('::common::system_classification')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
